name: physics
checklist: doc 13 M1 — eight crates tumble down just ahead of your spawn and settle on the slope.
Walk into the settled pile — crates are solid to each other and the terrain (you pass through them; player-vs-body coupling is a later milestone).
Open a second client: both see the SAME crate poses, live and settled.
Wait ~30s (a world save), then redeploy/restart the preview — the pile survives in place, still settled.
Crates near a building/tree rest against it, never inside it.
